zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Wentworth於1440年出生在英國越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾時，他的父親Richard Wentworth45歲，母親Cecilia Tansley59歲。他和Isabel FitzWilliam至少有6個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1488年10月3日在英國越可爾享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Wentworth was born in 1440, in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, his father, Richard Wentworth, was 45 and his mother, Cecilia Tansley, was 59. He had at least 6 sons and 5 daughters with Isabel FitzWilliam. He died on 3 October 1488, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Wentworth est né en 1440, à North Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard Wentworth, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Tansley, avait 59 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles avec Isabel FitzWilliam. Il est décédé le 3 octobre 1488, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

Er hatte mit Isabel FitzWilliam mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Oktober 1488 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Wentworth(이)가 1440년 영국 요르크실르 노르스 엘사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Wentworth(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia Tansley(은)는 59세였다. 그는 Isabel FitzWilliam(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1488년 10월 3일 영국 요르크실르에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Wentworth родился в 1440 г. в местности норт элмсалл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Wentworth было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Tansley, 59. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Isabel FitzWilliam. Он умер 3 октября 1488 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.
